task.json line 19; base URL http://localhost:8080 from docker-compose.yml line 25 (PUBLIC_URL=http://localhost:8080) and task_utils.sh line 4 (default JITSI_BASE_URL); room name /CompanyAllHands from setup_task.sh line 21
Jitsi Meet moderator settings feature, documented in community forums and GitHub issues (e.g., jitsi/jitsi-meet issues #10053, #10104). This is a standard moderator setting available in Jitsi Meet.
Jitsi Meet moderator settings feature, confirmed via GitHub issue jitsi/jitsi-meet#2742. This setting controls whether participants' video feeds are initially disabled when joining a meeting.

Jitsi Meet moderator settings feature. The full UI text is typically 'Everyone Follow Me', but commonly referenced as 'Follow me' setting. Documented in Jitsi Meet Iframe API commands (setFollowMe) and moderator documentation.

privileged_info_summary: The task configures moderator settings in Jitsi Meet version stable-9753. It operates on a synthetic meeting room named 'CompanyAllHands' hosted at http://localhost:8080/CompanyAllHands (confirmed by docker-compose.yml which sets PUBLIC_URL to http://localhost:8080). The task requires enabling three moderator toggles in the Settings dialog: 'Everyone starts muted' (ensures participants join with microphones muted), 'Everyone starts hidden' (ensures participants join with cameras off), and 'Follow me' (enables presenter view control). All three toggles are standard, verified Jitsi Meet moderator features available in version 9753 and earlier versions.
